languages.text: "Живое оружие древнего врага, сгинувшего в безвременье. Этот регион космоса редко привлекает эльдаров, поэтому экспозиция неполноценна. Другие отделения Музеона содержат более интересные экспонаты из данной цивилизации, однако пара интересных вещиц мне удалось обнаружить и в этом захолустье".

traits.locale_text: "Живое оружие древнего врага, сгинувшего в безвременье. Этот регион космоса редко привлекает эльдаров, поэтому экспозиция неполноценна. Другие отделения Музеона содержат более интересные экспонаты из данной цивилизации, однако пара интересных вещиц мне удалось обнаружить и в этом захолустье".

languages.text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."
languages.original_text: "Живое оружие древнего врага, сгинувшего в безвременье. Этот регион космоса редко привлекает эльдаров, поэтому экспозиция неполноценна. Другие отделения Музеона содержат более интересные экспонаты из данной цивилизации, однако пара интересных вещиц мне удалось обнаружить и в этом захолустье".

traits.locale_text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

"The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

"The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

languages.text: “一件属于远古宿敌的活体兵器，如今早已被时光遗忘。艾达灵族很少踏足这片虚空区域，所以这部分的展品还不完整。陈列馆的其他区域，有来自这个文明的其他藏品，它们更有看头。不过即便是在这种偏僻地区，我也搜罗到几件不错的东西。”
languages.original_text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

traits.locale_text: “一件属于远古宿敌的活体兵器，如今早已被时光遗忘。艾达灵族很少踏足这片虚空区域，所以这部分的展品还不完整。陈列馆的其他区域，有来自这个文明的其他藏品，它们更有看头。不过即便是在这种偏僻地区，我也搜罗到几件不错的东西。”

languages.text: «El arma viva de un enemigo ancestral perdido ante la atemporalidad. Esta región del vacío no suele atraer a los Aeldari, por lo que esta exposición no está completa. Hay otras secciones del Museion con ejemplos más interesantes de esta civilización, pero aun así he encontrado casos interesantes en este lugar remoto».
languages.original_text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

traits.locale_text: «El arma viva de un enemigo ancestral perdido ante la atemporalidad. Esta región del vacío no suele atraer a los Aeldari, por lo que esta exposición no está completa. Hay otras secciones del Museion con ejemplos más interesantes de esta civilización, pero aun así he encontrado casos interesantes en este lugar remoto».

languages.text: « L'arme vivante d'un vieil ennemi, qui s'est perdue dans les abîmes du temps. Cette région du vide attire rarement les Aeldaris, ce qui explique que cette vitrine soit incomplète. D'autres parties du Muséion contiennent davantage de pièces intéressantes issues de cette civilisation, mais j'ai réussi à trouver quelques œuvres dignes d'intérêt, même dans ce coin perdu. »
languages.original_text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

traits.locale_text: « L'arme vivante d'un vieil ennemi, qui s'est perdue dans les abîmes du temps. Cette région du vide attire rarement les Aeldaris, ce qui explique que cette vitrine soit incomplète. D'autres parties du Muséion contiennent davantage de pièces intéressantes issues de cette civilisation, mais j'ai réussi à trouver quelques œuvres dignes d'intérêt, même dans ce coin perdu. »

languages.text: "Zamansızlıkta kaybolmuş kadim bir düşmanın yaşayan silahı. Uçsuzun bu bölgesi, Aeldarileri nadiren cezbeder. Bu yüzden de sergi eksik. Museion'un diğer bölümlerinde bu medeniyete ait daha ilginç sergiler olsa da bu ücra köşede de birkaç ilginç parça bulmayı başardım."
languages.original_text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

traits.locale_text: "Zamansızlıkta kaybolmuş kadim bir düşmanın yaşayan silahı. Uçsuzun bu bölgesi, Aeldarileri nadiren cezbeder. Bu yüzden de sergi eksik. Museion'un diğer bölümlerinde bu medeniyete ait daha ilginç sergiler olsa da bu ücra köşede de birkaç ilginç parça bulmayı başardım."

languages.text: "Die lebende Waffe eines uralten Feindes, verloren in Zeitlosigkeit. Diese Region der Leere lockt nur selten Aeldari an. Deshalb ist die Ausstellung unvollständig. Andere Abteilungen des Museions enthalten interessantere Exponate dieser Zivilisation, aber ich konnte auch in dieser abgelegenen Region einige interessante Stücke finden."
languages.original_text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."

traits.locale_text: "Die lebende Waffe eines uralten Feindes, verloren in Zeitlosigkeit. Diese Region der Leere lockt nur selten Aeldari an. Deshalb ist die Ausstellung unvollständig. Andere Abteilungen des Museions enthalten interessantere Exponate dieser Zivilisation, aber ich konnte auch in dieser abgelegenen Region einige interessante Stücke finden."

languages.text: 「古代の敵の生きた兵器、時を超えて失われた。この虚空の領域は、アエルダリをほとんど引きつけない。そのため、展示は不完全である。このムゼイオンの他の部分には、この文明より興味深い展示品があるが、この辺鄙な場所でも、いくつか興味深いものを発見した。」
languages.original_text: "The living weapon of an ancient foe, lost to timelessness. This region of the void rarely attracts Aeldari, which is why the display is incomplete. Other sections of the Museion contain more interesting exhibits from this civilisation, but I managed to find a few interesting pieces in this backwater as well."
